testcase.name: logs_to_json_common::logs_to_json_edk2.py::contains_parse_logic
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/bbr/sct/logs_to_json_edk2.py suite=logs_to_json_common phase=case type=source_contains_any warning=False message=At least one pattern matched details: Matched patterns: parse, parser, parse_

testcase.name: logs_to_json_common::logs_to_json_edk2.py::contains_result_collection_logic
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/bbr/sct/logs_to_json_edk2.py suite=logs_to_json_common phase=case type=source_contains_any warning=False message=At least one pattern matched details: Matched patterns: results

testcase.name: logs_to_json_common::logs_to_json_edk2.py::contains_summary_logic
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/bbr/sct/logs_to_json_edk2.py suite=logs_to_json_common phase=case type=source_contains_any warning=False message=At least one pattern matched details: Matched patterns: "result", "reason"

testcase.name: logs_to_json_common::logs_to_json_edk2.py::contains_output_logic
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/bbr/sct/logs_to_json_edk2.py suite=logs_to_json_common phase=case type=source_contains_any warning=False message=At least one pattern matched details: Matched patterns: json.dump

testcase.name: logs_to_json_common::logs_to_json_edk2.py::has_main_guard
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/bbr/sct/logs_to_json_edk2.py suite=logs_to_json_common phase=case type=main_guard warning=False message=Main guard found

testcase.name: sr_logs_to_json_specific::sr_logs_to_json.py::has_sr_keyword
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/os_tests/sr_logs_to_json.py suite=sr_logs_to_json_specific phase=case type=source_contains_all warning=False message=All patterns matched

testcase.name: sr_logs_to_json_specific::sr_logs_to_json.py::has_sr_parse_logic
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/os_tests/sr_logs_to_json.py suite=sr_logs_to_json_specific phase=case type=source_contains_all warning=False message=All patterns matched

testcase.name: sr_logs_to_json_specific::sr_logs_to_json.py::has_sr_status_handling
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/os_tests/sr_logs_to_json.py suite=sr_logs_to_json_specific phase=case type=source_contains_all warning=False message=All patterns matched

testcase.name: sr_logs_to_json_specific::sr_logs_to_json.py::cli_requires_three_args
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/os_tests/sr_logs_to_json.py suite=sr_logs_to_json_specific phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/os_tests/sr_logs_to_json.py Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 1 --- STDOUT --- Usage: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/os_tests/sr_logs_to_json.py <os-logs-path> <post-script.log> <output JSON file path> --- STDERR ---

testcase.name: sr_logs_to_json_specific::sr_logs_to_json.py::cli_builds_json_for_rhel_and_sle
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/os_tests/sr_logs_to_json.py suite=sr_logs_to_json_specific phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: ./run_case.sh /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/os_tests/sr_logs_to_json.py Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 5 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR ---
--- POST CHECKS --- post_check file_not_empty: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/sr_logs_to_json_specific/sr_logs_to_json/5_cli_builds_json_for_rhel_and_sle/out.json -> PASS post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/sr_logs_to_json_specific/sr_logs_to_json/5_cli_builds_json_for_rhel_and_sle/out.json contains 'Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.3' -> PASS post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/sr_logs_to_json_specific/sr_logs_to_json/5_cli_builds_json_for_rhel_and_sle/out.json contains 'SLES 15' -> PASS

testcase.name: sr_logs_to_json_specific::sr_logs_to_json.py::cli_marks_missing_post_script_as_failed
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/os_tests/sr_logs_to_json.py suite=sr_logs_to_json_specific phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: ./run_case.sh /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/os_tests/sr_logs_to_json.py Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 5 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR ---
--- POST CHECKS --- post_check file_not_empty: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/sr_logs_to_json_specific/sr_logs_to_json/6_cli_marks_missing_post_script_as_failed/out.json -> PASS post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/sr_logs_to_json_specific/sr_logs_to_json/6_cli_marks_missing_post_script_as_failed/out.json contains 'post-script.log missing' -> PASS post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/sr_logs_to_json_specific/sr_logs_to_json/6_cli_marks_missing_post_script_as_failed/out.json contains '"total_failed": 2' -> PASS

testcase.name: edk2_logs_to_json_specific::logs_to_json_edk2.py::cli_requires_two_args
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/bbr/sct/logs_to_json_edk2.py suite=edk2_logs_to_json_specific phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/bbr/sct/logs_to_json_edk2.py Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 2 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR --- usage: logs_to_json_edk2.py [-h] input_file output_file logs_to_json_edk2.py: error: the following arguments are required: input_file, output_file

testcase.name: edk2_logs_to_json_specific::logs_to_json_edk2.py::cli_missing_input_file_fails
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/bbr/sct/logs_to_json_edk2.py suite=edk2_logs_to_json_specific phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/bbr/sct/logs_to_json_edk2.py /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/edk2_logs_to_json_specific/logs_to_json_edk2/4_cli_missing_input_file_fails/missing.log /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/edk2_logs_to_json_specific/logs_to_json_edk2/4_cli_missing_input_file_fails/out.json Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 1 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR --- Error: File not found: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/edk2_logs_to_json_specific/logs_to_json_edk2/4_cli_missing_input_file_fails/missing.log
